title: scPair: Boosting single cell multimodal analysis by leveraging implicit feature selection and single cell atlases.
author: Hu H Quon G
content: S-EPMC11568318 PMC11568318 scPair: Boosting single cell multimodal analysis by leveraging implicit feature selection and single cell atlases.
